Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:networkwormevent here].

====== Class NetworkWormEvent ======
<pre>
===== See also: =====
</pre>

[[Lua global#network_worm_event|network_worm_event]], [[Lua global#network_worm_event|network_worm_event]]

===== send =====
<pre>
 send(worm, [data[, connection[, mode[, rules]]]])
</pre>

Sends a worm event to one or more computers.

//worm// is the [[Lua worm|Worm]] object to [[#send]] the event on.

See [[Lua networkgameevent#send|Lua:networkgameevent#send]] for documentation of the other parameters.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618090237/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:networkwormevent -->
